evidence.description: Ahmadinejad appointed Tarighat Monfared as acting head of the Ministry of Health on 27 December 2012, following the dismissal of Marzieh Vahid-Dastjerdi the same day.

editorial_notes: Appointed same day Vahid-Dastjerdi was fired (27 Dec 2012). Tarighat Monfared then confirmed by parliament on 17 Mar 2013 as official minister.
